drills.title: There IS — Basic Singular Present
drills.instructions: इन sentences को ज़ोर से 3 बार repeat करें। 'There is' पर ध्यान दें।

sentences.english: There is a book on the table.
sentences.hindi: मेज पर एक किताब है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh book ON the TAY-bul

sentences.english: There is a fan in my room.
sentences.hindi: मेरे कमरे में एक पंखा है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh fan IN my room

sentences.english: There is a problem in the system.
sentences.hindi: सिस्टम में एक समस्या है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh PROB-lum in the SIS-tum

sentences.english: There is a meeting at 3 pm.
sentences.hindi: 3 बजे एक मीटिंग है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh MEE-ting at THREE pee-em

sentences.english: There is milk in the fridge.
sentences.hindi: फ्रिज में दूध है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz milk IN the frij

sentences.english: There is a lot of traffic today.
sentences.hindi: आज बहुत ट्रैफिक है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh LOT of TRAF-ik tuh-DAY

tips: 'There is' को तेज़ बोलते समय 'There's' बोलें
Noun पर stress दें, 'There is' पर नहीं
हर sentence के बाद एक पल रुकें

drills.title: There ARE — Basic Plural Present
drills.instructions: इन plural sentences को 3 बार repeat करें। 'There are' की sound पर ध्यान दें।

sentences.english: There are many students in the class.
sentences.hindi: कक्षा में कई छात्र हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee STU-dents in the klaas

sentences.english: There are five rooms in this house.
sentences.hindi: इस घर में पाँच कमरे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar FIVE rooms in this house

sentences.english: There are three files on my desk.
sentences.hindi: मेरी मेज पर तीन फाइलें हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar THREE files ON my desk

sentences.english: There are some apples in the basket.
sentences.hindi: टोकरी में कुछ सेब हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar SUM AP-ulz in the BAS-kit

sentences.english: There are two ATMs near here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ के पास दो ATM हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TWO ay-tee-ems NEAR here

sentences.english: There are many people waiting outside.
sentences.hindi: बाहर कई लोग इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee PEE-pul WAY-ting OUT-side

tips: 'There are' में 'r' sound link होती है — 'there-r-are' जैसा लगता है
Plural noun पर ध्यान दें — always ends in s/es or is irregular
Fast speech में 'there are' → 'there-r'

drills.title: There WAS — Singular Past
drills.instructions: भूतकाल के ये sentences repeat करें। 'There was' की past feeling महसूस करें।

sentences.english: There was a problem yesterday.
sentences.hindi: कल एक समस्या थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh PROB-lum YES-ter-day

sentences.english: There was a big party last night.
sentences.hindi: कल रात एक बड़ी पार्टी थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh BIG par-tee LAST night

sentences.english: There was a lot of noise outside.
sentences.hindi: बाहर बहुत शोर था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh LOT of NOIZ OUT-side

sentences.english: There was a hospital here before.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ पहले एक अस्पताल था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh HOS-pi-tul HERE buh-FOR

sentences.english: There was a mistake in my report.
sentences.hindi: मेरी रिपोर्ट में एक गलती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh mis-TAKE in my ree-PORT

sentences.english: There was a time when life was simple.
sentences.hindi: एक समय था जब जिंदगी सरल थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh TIME when LIFE wuz SIM-pul

tips: 'Was' को /wuz/ बोलते हैं — 'waz' नहीं
Past time words add करें: yesterday, last night, before, once
Storytelling में 'There was' से शुरू करने की practice करें

drills.title: There WERE — Plural Past
drills.instructions: ये plural past sentences repeat करें। History और stories में यह form बहुत useful है।

sentences.english: There were many people at the party.
sentences.hindi: पार्टी में कई लोग थे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur MAY-nee PEE-pul at the PAR-tee

sentences.english: There were five people in the meeting.
sentences.hindi: मीटिंग में पाँच लोग थे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur FIVE PEE-pul in the MEE-ting

sentences.english: There were no chairs available.
sentences.hindi: कोई कुर्सी उपलब्ध नहीं थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur NO chairs uh-VAY-luh-bul

sentences.english: There were many problems in the old system.
sentences.hindi: पुराने system में कई समस्याएँ थीं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur MAY-nee PROB-lumz in the OLD SIS-tum

sentences.english: There were no mobile phones in 1990.
sentences.hindi: 1990 में कोई mobile phone नहीं था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur NO MO-bile fonz in NINE-teen-ninety

sentences.english: There were days when I felt hopeless.
sentences.hindi: ऐसे दिन थे जब मैं निराश महसूस करता था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur DAYZ when I felt HOP-les

tips: 'Were' = /wur/ — not 'wear'
Notice: 'There were no...' is more emphatic than 'There weren't any...'
Use 'There were times when...' as a storytelling opener

drills.title: There WILL BE — Future
drills.instructions: Future sentences को confidently repeat करें। यह form singular और plural दोनों के लिए same रहती है।

sentences.english: There will be a meeting tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल एक मीटिंग होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh MEE-ting tuh-MOR-oh

sentences.english: There will be many people at the event.
sentences.hindi: इस event में कई लोग होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE MAY-nee PEE-pul at the ee-VENT

sentences.english: There will be a test next week.
sentences.hindi: अगले हफ्ते एक परीक्षा होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh test NEXT week

sentences.english: There will be no classes on Friday.
sentences.hindi: शुक्रवार को कोई कक्षाएँ नहीं होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE no KLAS-iz on FRY-day

sentences.english: There will be an announcement soon.
sentences.hindi: जल्द ही एक घोषणा होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE an uh-NOWNS-ment SOON

sentences.english: There will be heavy rain tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल भारी बारिश होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE HEV-ee RAYN tuh-MOR-oh

tips: 'Will be' = भविष्य का formula — singular/plural के लिए same!
Confidence के साथ बोलें — future announcements confident होनी चाहिए
'Will' को stress करें जब future certainty express करनी हो

drills.title: Negatives — There ISN'T / AREN'T
drills.instructions: Present negative sentences को natural contractions के साथ practice करें।

sentences.english: There isn't any milk in the fridge.
sentences.hindi: फ्रिज में दूध नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee milk in the frij

sentences.english: There aren't any chairs in the room.
sentences.hindi: कमरे में कोई कुर्सियाँ नहीं हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE AR-unt EN-ee chairz in the room

sentences.english: There isn't enough time.
sentences.hindi: पर्याप्त समय नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt ih-NUF time

sentences.english: There aren't any good restaurants here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ कोई अच्छे restaurants नहीं हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE AR-unt EN-ee good RES-tuh-ronts HERE

sentences.english: There isn't a single copy available.
sentences.hindi: एक भी copy उपलब्ध नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt uh SIN-gul KOP-ee uh-VAY-luh-bul

sentences.english: There isn't any Wi-Fi in this area.
sentences.hindi: इस इलाके में Wi-Fi नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee WY-fy in this AIR-ee-uh

tips: 'Isn't' और 'aren't' contractions naturally sound करते हैं
Negative sentences में 'any' use करें, 'some' नहीं
'There is no...' और 'There isn't any...' दोनों correct हैं

drills.title: Negatives — There WASN'T / WEREN'T
drills.instructions: Past negative sentences practice करें। ये sentences doubt/denial express करते हैं।

sentences.english: There wasn't a problem before.
sentences.hindi: पहले कोई समस्या नहीं थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUZ-unt uh PROB-lum buh-FOR

sentences.english: There weren't many people at the meeting.
sentences.hindi: मीटिंग में ज्यादा लोग नहीं थे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUR-unt MAY-nee PEE-pul at the MEE-ting

sentences.english: There wasn't any food left.
sentences.hindi: कोई खाना बचा नहीं था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUZ-unt EN-ee food LEFT

sentences.english: There weren't any questions from the students.
sentences.hindi: छात्रों से कोई सवाल नहीं थे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUR-unt EN-ee KWEST-yunz from the STU-dents

sentences.english: There wasn't enough space.
sentences.hindi: पर्याप्त जगह नहीं थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUZ-unt ih-NUF SPAYS

sentences.english: There weren't any buses after 9 pm.
sentences.hindi: रात 9 बजे के बाद कोई bus नहीं थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WUR-unt EN-ee BUS-iz AF-ter NINE pee-em

tips: 'Wasn't' = /WUZ-unt/ | 'Weren't' = /WUR-unt/
Contrast with present: 'There isn't...' vs 'There wasn't...'
Add time words for clarity: before, then, at that time

drills.title: Negatives — There WON'T BE / HASN'T BEEN
drills.instructions: Future और present perfect negative forms practice करें।

sentences.english: There won't be any classes tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल कोई classes नहीं होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WONT BEE EN-ee KLAS-iz tuh-MOR-oh

sentences.english: There won't be any delay this time.
sentences.hindi: इस बार कोई देरी नहीं होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WONT BEE EN-ee duh-LAY this TIME

sentences.english: There hasn't been any rain this month.
sentences.hindi: इस महीने कोई बारिश नहीं हुई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE HAZ-unt BIN EN-ee RAYN this munth

sentences.english: There haven't been any complaints so far.
sentences.hindi: अभी तक कोई शिकायत नहीं आई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE HAV-unt BIN EN-ee kum-PLAYTS so FAR

sentences.english: There won't be a meeting next Monday.
sentences.hindi: अगले सोमवार कोई मीटिंग नहीं होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE WONT BEE uh MEE-ting next MUN-day

sentences.english: There hasn't been any progress on this issue.
sentences.hindi: इस मुद्दे पर कोई progress नहीं हुई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE HAZ-unt BIN EN-ee PROG-res on this ISH-oo

tips: 'Won't be' = will not be — future negative
Notice: 'hasn't been' (singular) vs 'haven't been' (plural)
These forms are very common in professional communication

drills.title: Questions — IS THERE? / ARE THERE?
drills.instructions: Present tense questions practice करें। Verb को 'there' से पहले रखें। Voice को sentence के end में थोड़ा ऊपर उठाएं।

sentences.english: Is there a pen on the table?
sentences.hindi: क्या मेज पर एक कलम है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there uh PEN on the TAY-bul?

sentences.english: Are there any seats available?
sentences.hindi: क्या कोई सीटें उपलब्ध हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: AR there EN-ee SEETS uh-VAY-luh-bul?

sentences.english: Is there any milk in the fridge?
sentences.hindi: क्या फ्रिज में दूध है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there EN-ee MILK in the frij?

sentences.english: Are there any good doctors here?
sentences.hindi: क्या यहाँ कोई अच्छे डॉक्टर हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: AR there EN-ee good DOK-torz HERE?

sentences.english: Is there a bathroom on this floor?
sentences.hindi: क्या इस floor पर bathroom है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there uh BATH-room on this FLOR?

sentences.english: Are there enough resources for this project?
sentences.hindi: क्या इस project के लिए पर्याप्त resources हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: AR there ih-NUF REE-sor-siz for this PROJ-ekt?

tips: Questions में voice end में ऊपर जाती है (rising intonation)
Short answer practice: 'Yes, there is.' / 'No, there isn't.'
'Is there anything...?' = बहुत polite question form

drills.title: Questions — WAS THERE? / WERE THERE? / WILL THERE BE?
drills.instructions: Past और future question forms practice करें।

sentences.english: Was there a problem in the meeting?
sentences.hindi: क्या मीटिंग में कोई समस्या थी?
sentences.pronunciation: WUZ there uh PROB-lum in the MEE-ting?

sentences.english: Were there many people at the event?
sentences.hindi: क्या event में कई लोग थे?
sentences.pronunciation: WUR there MAY-nee PEE-pul at the ee-VENT?

sentences.english: Will there be a test tomorrow?
sentences.hindi: क्या कल परीक्षा होगी?
sentences.pronunciation: WIL there BEE uh test tuh-MOR-oh?

sentences.english: Was there a train at 7 am?
sentences.hindi: क्या सुबह 7 बजे ट्रेन थी?
sentences.pronunciation: WUZ there uh TRAYN at SEV-un ay-em?

sentences.english: Were there any complaints last month?
sentences.hindi: क्या पिछले महीने कोई शिकायतें थीं?
sentences.pronunciation: WUR there EN-ee kum-PLAYTS last munth?

sentences.english: Will there be any changes in the plan?
sentences.hindi: क्या plan में कोई बदलाव होंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: WIL there BEE EN-ee CHAYN-jiz in the plan?

tips: 'Was there?' = एकवचन past question
'Were there?' = बहुवचन past question
'Will there be?' = future question — same for singular and plural

drills.title: Mixed Tense Drill 1 — Present to Past
drills.instructions: Present sentence को Past में change करें। Hindi prompt देखें, फिर English बोलें।

sentences.english: Present: There is a problem. → Past: There was a problem.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: समस्या है। → समस्या थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh PROB-lum

sentences.english: Present: There are many people. → Past: There were many people.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: कई लोग हैं। → कई लोग थे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur MAY-nee PEE-pul

sentences.english: Present: There is a meeting. → Past: There was a meeting.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: मीटिंग है। → मीटिंग थी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh MEE-ting

sentences.english: Present: There are 5 files. → Past: There were 5 files.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: 5 फाइलें हैं। → 5 फाइलें थीं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur FIVE fylz

sentences.english: Present: There is noise. → Past: There was noise.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: शोर है। → शोर था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz NOIZ

sentences.english: Present: There are complaints. → Past: There were complaints.
sentences.hindi: Present → Past: शिकायतें हैं। → शिकायतें थीं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur kum-PLAYTS

tips: IS → WAS (singular) | ARE → WERE (plural)
Past time words add करें: yesterday, last week, before
Transformation drill = tense change की fastest practice

drills.title: Mixed Tense Drill 2 — Present to Future
drills.instructions: Present sentence को Future में change करें।

sentences.english: Present: There is a meeting. → Future: There will be a meeting.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: मीटिंग है। → मीटिंग होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh MEE-ting

sentences.english: Present: There are many problems. → Future: There will be many problems.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: कई समस्याएँ हैं। → कई समस्याएँ होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE MAY-nee PROB-lumz

sentences.english: Present: There is a party. → Future: There will be a party.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: पार्टी है। → पार्टी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh PAR-tee

sentences.english: Present: There are classes. → Future: There will be classes.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: कक्षाएँ हैं। → कक्षाएँ होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE KLAS-iz

sentences.english: Present: There is traffic. → Future: There will be traffic.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: ट्रैफिक है। → ट्रैफिक होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE TRAF-ik

sentences.english: Present: There are many options. → Future: There will be many options.
sentences.hindi: Present → Future: कई विकल्प हैं। → कई विकल्प होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE MAY-nee OP-shunz

tips: IS/ARE → WILL BE (both singular and plural)
'Will be' never changes — यही इसकी खूबी है!
Future time words: tomorrow, next week, soon, later

drills.title: Quantifier Drill — SOME / ANY / NO
drills.instructions: Some, any, no के साथ There sentences practice करें। Context देखकर सही quantifier choose करें।

sentences.english: There are some books on the shelf. (positive)
sentences.hindi: शेल्फ पर कुछ किताबें हैं। (+)
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar SUM books ON the shelf

sentences.english: There isn't any water in the bottle. (negative)
sentences.hindi: बोतल में पानी नहीं है। (−)
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee WAW-ter in the BOT-ul

sentences.english: Is there any milk in the fridge? (question)
sentences.hindi: क्या फ्रिज में दूध है? (?)
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there EN-ee MILK in the frij?

sentences.english: There is no time to waste. (strong negative)
sentences.hindi: बर्बाद करने के लिए समय नहीं है। (✗)
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz NO TIME to wayst

sentences.english: There are some notifications on your phone. (positive)
sentences.hindi: आपके phone पर कुछ notifications हैं। (+)
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar SUM no-tif-ih-KAY-shunz on YOUR fon

sentences.english: There aren't any vegetarian options here. (negative)
sentences.hindi: यहाँ कोई vegetarian विकल्प नहीं हैं। (−)
sentences.pronunciation: THERE AR-unt EN-ee VEJ-ih-TAIR-ee-un OP-shunz HERE

tips: SOME = positive | ANY = negative/question | NO = strong negative
कभी 'There is no any' मत बोलो — यह wrong है
Practice: बोलने से पहले सोचें: क्या यह + / − / ? sentence है?

drills.title: Quantifier Drill — MANY / FEW / A LOT OF / ENOUGH
drills.instructions: Advanced quantifiers के साथ There sentences practice करें।

sentences.english: There are many challenges in this field.
sentences.hindi: इस field में कई चुनौतियाँ हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee CHAL-en-jiz in this FEELD

sentences.english: There are a few options available.
sentences.hindi: कुछ विकल्प उपलब्ध हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar uh FYOO OP-shunz uh-VAY-luh-bul

sentences.english: There is a lot of work to do.
sentences.hindi: बहुत काम करना है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh LOT uv WURK to doo

sentences.english: There are enough seats for everyone.
sentences.hindi: सबके लिए पर्याप्त सीटें हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar ih-NUF SEETS for EV-ree-wun

sentences.english: There isn't enough budget for this project.
sentences.hindi: इस project के लिए पर्याप्त budget नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt ih-NUF BUJ-it for this PROJ-ekt

sentences.english: There are numerous advantages of learning English.
sentences.hindi: अंग्रेज़ी सीखने के अनेक फायदे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar NOO-mer-us ad-VAN-tij-iz uv LUR-ning ING-glish

tips: 'A lot of' = universal — countable और uncountable दोनों के साथ work करता है
'Few' (almost none) vs 'a few' (some, positive) — difference याद रखें
'Enough' = पर्याप्त — very useful in professional contexts

drills.title: Office Context Drill 1 — Meetings & Tasks
drills.instructions: ये professional office sentences हैं। इन्हें confidently बोलें — जैसे आप किसी colleague से बात कर रहे हों।

sentences.english: There is a meeting at 10 am tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल सुबह 10 बजे एक मीटिंग है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh MEE-ting at TEN ay-em tuh-MOR-oh

sentences.english: There are five tasks pending for today.
sentences.hindi: आज के लिए पाँच काम बाकी हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar FIVE tasks PEN-ding for tuh-DAY

sentences.english: There will be a product launch next month.
sentences.hindi: अगले महीने एक product launch होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh PROD-ukt LONCH NEXT munth

sentences.english: There has been a delay in the project.
sentences.hindi: project में देरी हुई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE haz BIN uh duh-LAY in the PROJ-ekt

sentences.english: There isn't enough budget for this initiative.
sentences.hindi: इस initiative के लिए पर्याप्त budget नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt ih-NUF BUJ-it for this ih-NISH-ee-ut-iv

sentences.english: There is an urgent email from the client.
sentences.hindi: client का एक urgent email आया है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz an UR-junt EE-mayl from the KLY-unt

tips: Office में 'There is/are' = सबसे common professional structure
'There has been' = professional update देने का तरीका
Confidence important है — hesitate मत करें

drills.title: Office Context Drill 2 — Reports & Updates
drills.instructions: ये sentences reporting और updates के लिए हैं। Email और presentations में use होते हैं।

sentences.english: There have been several complaints from clients.
sentences.hindi: clients से कई शिकायतें आई हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE hav BIN SEV-er-ul kum-PLAYTS from KLY-unts

sentences.english: There are three candidates shortlisted for the role.
sentences.hindi: इस पद के लिए तीन उम्मीदवार shortlist हुए हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar THREE KAN-dih-dayts SHORT-listed for the ROLE

sentences.english: There will be a training session next week.
sentences.hindi: अगले हफ्ते एक training session होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh TRAY-ning SESH-un NEXT week

sentences.english: There is a new policy effective from Monday.
sentences.hindi: सोमवार से एक नई policy लागू होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh NOO POL-ih-see ih-FEK-tiv from MUN-day

sentences.english: There are two ways to solve this issue.
sentences.hindi: इस समस्या को सुलझाने के दो तरीके हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO WAYZ to SOLV this ISH-oo

sentences.english: There is room for improvement in your report.
sentences.hindi: आपकी report में सुधार की गुंजाइश है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz ROOM for im-PROOV-ment in YOR rih-PORT

tips: 'There have been complaints' = professional complaint reporting
'There is room for improvement' = polite feedback phrase — memorise it!
These sentences work in emails, meetings, and performance reviews

drills.title: Travel & Place Description Drill 1 — Describing a City
drills.instructions: अपने शहर/गाँव के बारे में ये sentences बोलें। फिर अपने शहर के बारे में खुद 5 sentences बनाएँ।

sentences.english: There is a famous fort in this city.
sentences.hindi: इस शहर में एक प्रसिद्ध किला है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh FAY-mus FORT in this SIT-ee

sentences.english: There are many historical monuments here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ कई ऐतिहासिक स्मारक हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee his-TOR-ih-kul MON-yoo-ments HERE

sentences.english: There is a river flowing through the city.
sentences.hindi: शहर से होकर एक नदी बहती है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh RIV-er FLO-ing THROO the SIT-ee

sentences.english: There are many universities in this area.
sentences.hindi: इस इलाके में कई विश्वविद्यालय हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee yoo-nih-VUR-sih-teez in this AIR-ee-uh

sentences.english: There isn't much public transport available at night.
sentences.hindi: रात को ज्यादा public transport उपलब्ध नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt MUCH PUB-lik TRANS-port uh-VAY-luh-bul at NIGHT

sentences.english: There will be a new metro line by 2026.
sentences.hindi: 2026 तक एक नई metro line होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh NOO MET-roh LINE by TWO-THOU-zund-TWEN-tee-SIX

tips: Place descriptions में 'There is/are' the most natural structure है
अपने शहर की खूबियाँ 'There are' से और कमियाँ 'There isn't/aren't' से बताएँ
This pattern is used in travel blogs, tour guides, and geography essays

drills.title: Travel & Place Description Drill 2 — Giving Directions
drills.instructions: Directions देते समय 'There is' का प्रयोग करें। ये sentences किसी को रास्ता बताने में काम आते हैं।

sentences.english: There is a bank on the right side of the road.
sentences.hindi: सड़क के दाईं तरफ एक बैंक है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh BANK on the RIGHT side uv the ROAD

sentences.english: There are traffic lights at the next junction.
sentences.hindi: अगले चौराहे पर traffic lights हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TRAF-ik LYTS at the NEXT JUNK-shun

sentences.english: There is a petrol pump just 500 meters away.
sentences.hindi: 500 मीटर की दूरी पर एक petrol pump है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh PET-rol PUMP JUST FIVE-HUN-dred MEE-turz uh-WAY

sentences.english: There is a shortcut through the park.
sentences.hindi: पार्क के रास्ते एक shortcut है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh SHORT-kut THROO the PARK

sentences.english: There are two flyovers before you reach the station.
sentences.hindi: station पहुँचने से पहले दो flyover हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO FLY-oh-verz buh-FOR you REECH the STAY-shun

sentences.english: There isn't any parking near the hospital.
sentences.hindi: अस्पताल के पास कोई parking नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee PAR-king NEAR the HOS-pi-tul

tips: 'There is a ... on the right/left' = standard direction-giving formula
Location words: on the right, on the left, at the corner, next to, near, opposite
Practice by giving directions from your home to the nearest market

drills.title: Roleplay — Describing Your House
drills.instructions: Imagine आप अपने दोस्त को अपने नए घर के बारे में बता रहे हैं। इन sentences को naturally बोलें।

sentences.english: There are three bedrooms in my house.
sentences.hindi: मेरे घर में तीन bedrooms हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar THREE BED-roomz in MY house

sentences.english: There is a big kitchen with a dining area.
sentences.hindi: एक बड़ी kitchen है जिसमें dining area भी है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh BIG KITCH-un with uh DY-ning AIR-ee-uh

sentences.english: There is a garden at the back of the house.
sentences.hindi: घर के पीछे एक बगीचा है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh GAR-dun at the BACK uv the HOUSE

sentences.english: There are two bathrooms — one on each floor.
sentences.hindi: दो bathrooms हैं — हर floor पर एक।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO BATH-roomz — ONE on EACH FLOR

sentences.english: There isn't a lift, but there are stairs.
sentences.hindi: lift नहीं है, लेकिन सीढ़ियाँ हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt uh LIFT but THERE ar STAIRZ

sentences.english: There will be a study room once we renovate.
sentences.hindi: जब हम renovation करेंगे तो एक study room होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh STUD-ee ROOM WUNS wee REN-oh-vayt

tips: House description = best 'There is/are' practice!
आज अपने घर का एक room by room description करें
Add details: 'There is a window overlooking the street'

drills.title: Roleplay — Describing Your Neighbourhood
drills.instructions: Imagine आप किसी नए दोस्त को अपने इलाके के बारे में बता रहे हैं।

sentences.english: There is a big market just two minutes from my house.
sentences.hindi: मेरे घर से दो मिनट की दूरी पर एक बड़ा बाज़ार है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh BIG MAR-kit JUST TOO MIN-its from MY house

sentences.english: There are many good schools in this area.
sentences.hindi: इस इलाके में कई अच्छे स्कूल हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee good SKOOLK in this AIR-ee-uh

sentences.english: There is a park where children play every evening.
sentences.hindi: एक पार्क है जहाँ बच्चे हर शाम खेलते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh PARK where CHIL-drun PLAY EV-ree EEV-ning

sentences.english: There aren't many parking problems here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ parking की ज्यादा समस्या नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE AR-unt MAY-nee PAR-king PROB-lumz HERE

sentences.english: There was a lot of construction here two years ago.
sentences.hindi: दो साल पहले यहाँ बहुत निर्माण कार्य था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wuz uh LOT uv kun-STRUK-shun HERE TOO YEERZ uh-GO

sentences.english: There will be a new hospital in this area by next year.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक इस इलाके में एक नया अस्पताल होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh NOO HOS-pi-tul in this AIR-ee-uh by NEXT YEER

tips: Neighbourhood description में present, past और future सभी mix करें
Use 'There was...' to talk about old neighbourhood vs 'There is...' for current state
Great speaking practice: describe your area to yourself in the mirror

drills.title: Roleplay — Giving Directions (Bank, Market, Temple)
drills.instructions: आप किसी visitor को directions दे रहे हैं। Confidently और clearly बोलें।

sentences.english: There is a temple at the end of this road — you can't miss it.
sentences.hindi: इस सड़क के अंत में एक मंदिर है — आप miss नहीं कर सकते।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh TEM-pul at the END uv this ROAD — you KAAN-t MISS it

sentences.english: There is a petrol pump before the signal on the left.
sentences.hindi: signal से पहले बाईं तरफ एक petrol pump है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh PET-rol PUMP buh-FOR the SIG-nul on the LEFT

sentences.english: There are two hospitals on this street — go to the bigger one.
sentences.hindi: इस सड़क पर दो अस्पताल हैं — बड़े वाले में जाएँ।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO HOS-pi-tulz on this STREET — GO to the BIG-er WUN

sentences.english: There isn't any direct bus — you'll have to change at the station.
sentences.hindi: कोई direct bus नहीं है — आपको station पर बदलना होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee di-REKT BUS — yool HAF to CHAYNJ at the STAY-shun

sentences.english: There is an auto stand at the corner — take an auto from there.
sentences.hindi: कोने पर एक auto stand है — वहाँ से auto लें।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz an AW-to STAND at the KOR-ner — TAYK an AW-to from THERE

sentences.english: There are stairs on the right — the office is on the third floor.
sentences.hindi: दाईं तरफ सीढ़ियाँ हैं — office तीसरी मंज़िल पर है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar STAIRZ on the RIGHT — the OF-is iz on the THIRD FLOR

tips: Direction देते समय 'There is a... on the right/left' pattern use करें
Be specific with locations: before the signal, at the corner, on the left
Practice by mentally walking from your home to a known landmark

drills.title: Roleplay — Giving Directions (School, Station, Market)
drills.instructions: Partner के साथ practice करें — एक direction माँगे, दूसरा 'There is/are' से जवाब दे।

sentences.english: There is a metro station about 10 minutes' walk from here.
sentences.hindi: यहाँ से लगभग 10 मिनट की पैदल दूरी पर एक metro station है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh MET-roh STAY-shun uh-BOWT TEN MIN-its WAWK from HERE

sentences.english: There are two gates — enter from the main gate.
sentences.hindi: दो gates हैं — main gate से अंदर जाएँ।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO GAYTS — EN-ter from the MAYN GAYT

sentences.english: There is a big hoarding outside the school — you'll find it easily.
sentences.hindi: स्कूल के बाहर एक बड़ा hoarding है — आसानी से मिल जाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh BIG HOR-ding OUT-side the SKOOL — yool FYND it EEZ-uh-lee

sentences.english: There is no direct road — you have to go around the lake.
sentences.hindi: कोई direct सड़क नहीं है — झील के चारों तरफ जाना होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz NO di-REKT ROAD — you HAF to GO uh-ROWND the LAYK

sentences.english: There are signs all along the way — just follow them.
sentences.hindi: रास्ते भर signs लगे हैं — बस उनका अनुसरण करें।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar SYNZ AWL uh-LONG the WAY — JUST FOL-oh them

sentences.english: There will be a traffic diversion from 2 pm — avoid this road.
sentences.hindi: 2 बजे से traffic diversion होगा — इस सड़क से बचें।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh TRAF-ik dy-VUR-zhun from TWO pee-em — uh-VOID this ROAD

tips: Roleplay with a classmate — one asks 'Excuse me, is there a...?' and other answers
Useful in real life: shops, hospitals, stations — practice these directions daily
Add landmarks for clarity: 'There is a bank — it's opposite the post office'

drills.title: Roleplay — Office Announcement (There Will Be)
drills.instructions: आप एक manager हैं और team को announcement दे रहे हैं। Confident, professional tone maintain करें।

sentences.english: There will be a team meeting tomorrow at 9 am sharp.
sentences.hindi: कल सुबह ठीक 9 बजे एक team meeting होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh TEEM MEE-ting tuh-MOR-oh at NINE ay-em SHARP

sentences.english: There will be no work from home next week.
sentences.hindi: अगले हफ्ते work from home नहीं होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE NO WURK from HOME NEXT week

sentences.english: There will be a training programme on communication skills.
sentences.hindi: Communication skills पर एक training programme होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh TRAY-ning PRO-gram on kuh-MYOO-nih-KAY-shun SKILZ

sentences.english: There will be performance reviews starting Monday.
sentences.hindi: सोमवार से performance reviews शुरू होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE per-FORM-uns rih-VYOOZ START-ing MUN-day

sentences.english: There won't be any overtime this month.
sentences.hindi: इस महीने कोई overtime नहीं होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wont BEE EN-ee OH-ver-time this MUNTH

sentences.english: There will be a new system in place from next quarter.
sentences.hindi: अगली तिमाही से एक नया system लागू होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh NOO SIS-tum in PLAYS from NEXT KWOR-ter

tips: Announcements में 'There will be' = authority और clarity का tone
Practice in front of a mirror — imagine addressing your team
Professional announcements need confident delivery — don't hesitate

drills.title: Roleplay — Office Announcement (Updates & Changes)
drills.instructions: आप updates और changes की जानकारी दे रहे हैं। Professional tone के साथ practice करें।

sentences.english: There has been a change in the project deadline.
sentences.hindi: project की deadline में बदलाव हुआ है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE haz BIN uh CHAYNJ in the PROJ-ekt DED-lyne

sentences.english: There have been some updates to the company policy.
sentences.hindi: company policy में कुछ updates हुई हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE hav BIN SUM UP-dayts to the KUM-puh-nee POL-ih-see

sentences.english: There is a new form that everyone needs to fill.
sentences.hindi: एक नया form है जो सभी को भरना है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh NOO FORM that EV-ree-wun NEEDZ to FIL

sentences.english: There are three action items from today's meeting.
sentences.hindi: आज की meeting से तीन action items हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar THREE AK-shun I-tumz from tuh-DAYZ MEE-ting

sentences.english: There isn't enough time to discuss all points today.
sentences.hindi: आज सभी points discuss करने के लिए पर्याप्त समय नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt ih-NUF TIME to dih-SKUS AWL POYNTS tuh-DAY

sentences.english: There will be a follow-up meeting on Thursday.
sentences.hindi: गुरुवार को एक follow-up meeting होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh FOL-oh-up MEE-ting on THURZ-day

tips: 'There has been a change' = professional way to announce a change
'There are three action items' = structured meeting conclusion
Write these sentences in your next work email!

drills.title: Roleplay — Hotel Receptionist
drills.instructions: आप एक hotel receptionist हैं। Guest के सवालों का 'There is/are' से जवाब दें। Polite और professional रहें।

sentences.english: There is a room available on the third floor.
sentences.hindi: तीसरी मंज़िल पर एक room उपलब्ध है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh ROOM uh-VAY-luh-bul on the THIRD FLOR

sentences.english: There are two types of rooms — standard and deluxe.
sentences.hindi: दो प्रकार के rooms हैं — standard और deluxe।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar TOO TYPS uv ROOMZ — STAN-derd and dih-LUKS

sentences.english: There is complimentary breakfast from 7 to 10 am.
sentences.hindi: सुबह 7 से 10 बजे तक complimentary breakfast है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz KOM-pluh-men-tuh-ree BREK-fust from SEV-un to TEN ay-em

sentences.english: There is a swimming pool on the rooftop.
sentences.hindi: rooftop पर एक swimming pool है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh SWIM-ing POOL on the ROOF-top

sentences.english: There aren't any rooms with a sea view right now.
sentences.hindi: अभी sea view वाले कोई rooms उपलब्ध नहीं हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE AR-unt EN-ee ROOMZ with uh SEE VYOO RYT now

sentences.english: There will be room service available until midnight.
sentences.hindi: आधी रात तक room service उपलब्ध होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE ROOM SUR-vis uh-VAY-luh-bul un-TIL MID-nyt

tips: Hotel receptionist = polite, clear, professional 'There is/are' usage
Always confirm availability: 'Yes, there is...' or 'I'm sorry, there isn't...'
Practice this roleplay with a partner — one is guest, one is receptionist

drills.title: Roleplay — Checking into a Hotel (Guest Side)
drills.instructions: अब आप guest हैं। Hotel की facilities के बारे में पूछने की practice करें।

sentences.english: Excuse me, is there a gym in this hotel?
sentences.hindi: माफ करें, क्या इस hotel में gym है?
sentences.pronunciation: ek-SKYOOZ mee IZ there uh JIM in this hoh-TEL?

sentences.english: Are there any rooms available for tonight?
sentences.hindi: क्या आज रात के लिए कोई rooms उपलब्ध हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: AR there EN-ee ROOMZ uh-VAY-luh-bul for tuh-NYT?

sentences.english: Is there parking available for guests?
sentences.hindi: क्या guests के लिए parking उपलब्ध है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there PAR-king uh-VAY-luh-bul for GUESTS?

sentences.english: Are there any vegetarian options in the restaurant?
sentences.hindi: क्या restaurant में vegetarian options हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: AR there EN-ee VEJ-ih-TAIR-ee-un OP-shunz in the RES-tuh-ront?

sentences.english: Is there a doctor on call in case of emergency?
sentences.hindi: क्या emergency की स्थिति में एक doctor on call है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there uh DOK-tor on KAWL in KAYS uv ih-MUR-jun-see?

sentences.english: Will there be a checkout reminder in the morning?
sentences.hindi: क्या सुबह checkout reminder होगा?
sentences.pronunciation: WIL there BEE uh CHEK-owt rih-MY-nder in the MOR-ning?

tips: As a guest, use 'Is there...? / Are there...?' for all requests
Always be polite: 'Excuse me, is there...?' or 'Could you tell me if there is...?'
Practice full conversation: guest asks, receptionist answers

drills.title: Roleplay — Reporting a Problem (IT/Technical)
drills.instructions: आप IT department या manager को एक technical problem report कर रहे हैं। Professional 'There is/has been' use करें।

sentences.english: There is a bug in the system that is affecting all users.
sentences.hindi: system में एक bug है जो सभी users को affect कर रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh BUG in the SIS-tum that iz uh-FEK-ting AWL YOO-zerz

sentences.english: There has been a server outage since this morning.
sentences.hindi: आज सुबह से server बंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE haz BIN uh SUR-ver OWT-ij SINS this MOR-ning

sentences.english: There isn't any internet connection on the second floor.
sentences.hindi: दूसरी मंज़िल पर internet connection नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee IN-ter-net kuh-NEK-shun on the SEK-und FLOR

sentences.english: There have been multiple login failures in the past hour.
sentences.hindi: पिछले एक घंटे में कई बार login fail हुई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE hav BIN MUL-tih-pul LOG-in FAYL-yerz in the PAST OW-er

sentences.english: There is an error message appearing every time I open the software.
sentences.hindi: हर बार software खोलने पर एक error message आता है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz an ER-er MES-ij uh-PEER-ing EV-ree TIME I OH-pun the SOFT-wayr

sentences.english: There won't be any disruption once the update is installed.
sentences.hindi: update install होने के बाद कोई disruption नहीं होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wont BEE EN-ee dis-RUP-shun WUNS the UP-dayt iz in-STAWLD

tips: IT problem reporting = 'There is a bug / There has been an outage'
Be specific: 'There is a bug in the login module' not just 'There is a problem'
Resolution: 'There will be no disruption after the fix'

drills.title: Roleplay — Reporting a Problem (General/Daily Life)
drills.instructions: आप किसी को general problem report कर रहे हैं। 'There is/has been' se problem clearly describe करें।

sentences.english: There is a water leakage in the ceiling of my office.
sentences.hindi: मेरे office की छत में पानी का रिसाव है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh WAW-ter LEEK-ij in the SEE-ling uv MY OF-is

sentences.english: There has been a power cut in our building for two hours.
sentences.hindi: हमारी building में दो घंटे से बिजली नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE haz BIN uh POW-er KUT in OW-er BIL-ding for TOO OW-erz

sentences.english: There isn't any hot water in the bathroom.
sentences.hindi: bathroom में गर्म पानी नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt EN-ee HOT WAW-ter in the BATH-room

sentences.english: There were complaints about the noise from the floor above.
sentences.hindi: ऊपर की मंज़िल से आने वाले शोर के बारे में शिकायतें थीं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur kum-PLAYTS uh-BOWT the NOIZ from the FLOR uh-BUV

sentences.english: There is a crack in the wall that needs urgent repair.
sentences.hindi: दीवार में एक दरार है जिसे urgent repair की ज़रूरत है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz uh KRAK in the WAWL that NEEDZ UR-junt rih-PAIR

sentences.english: There have been several issues with the lift this week.
sentences.hindi: इस हफ्ते lift में कई बार दिक्कत आई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE hav BIN SEV-er-ul ISH-ooz with the LIFT this WEEK

tips: Problem reporting = 'There is' (current) or 'There has been' (recent)
Always describe the problem clearly and specifically
Add urgency: 'There is an urgent issue that needs immediate attention'

drills.title: Speed Drill — Positive to Negative to Question
drills.instructions: हर sentence को तीनों forms में बोलें — positive, negative, question। जितना हो सके fast बोलें।

sentences.english: There IS a meeting. → There ISN'T a meeting. → IS THERE a meeting?
sentences.hindi: मीटिंग है। → मीटिंग नहीं है। → क्या मीटिंग है?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-iz / THERE-IZ-unt / IZ-there

sentences.english: There ARE 5 tasks. → There AREN'T 5 tasks. → ARE THERE 5 tasks?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-ar / THERE-AR-unt / AR-there

sentences.english: There WAS a problem. → There WASN'T a problem. → WAS THERE a problem?
sentences.hindi: समस्या थी। → समस्या नहीं थी। → क्या समस्या थी?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-wuz / THERE-WUZ-unt / WUZ-there

sentences.english: There WERE complaints. → There WEREN'T complaints. → WERE THERE complaints?
sentences.hindi: शिकायतें थीं। → शिकायतें नहीं थीं। → क्या शिकायतें थीं?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-wur / THERE-WUR-unt / WUR-there

sentences.english: There WILL BE a test. → There WON'T BE a test. → WILL THERE BE a test?
sentences.hindi: परीक्षा होगी। → परीक्षा नहीं होगी। → क्या परीक्षा होगी?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-wil-BEE / THERE-wont-BEE / WIL-there-BEE

sentences.english: There HAS BEEN a change. → There HASN'T BEEN a change. → HAS THERE BEEN a change?
sentences.hindi: बदलाव हुआ है। → बदलाव नहीं हुआ है। → क्या बदलाव हुआ है?
sentences.pronunciation: THERE-haz-BIN / THERE-HAZ-unt-BIN / HAZ-there-BIN

tips: Speed drill = automatic fluency build करता है
Set a timer — try to complete all 6 in 60 seconds
First slow, then fast — accuracy first, then speed

drills.title: Ultimate Transformation Drill — Hindi to English
drills.instructions: Hindi sentence देखें और तुरंत English में बोलें। Think fast, speak fast!

sentences.english: कल सुबह 10 बजे एक मीटिंग होगी। → There will be a meeting at 10 am tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल सुबह 10 बजे एक मीटिंग होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wil BEE uh MEE-ting at TEN ay-em tuh-MOR-oh

sentences.english: इस field में कई चुनौतियाँ हैं। → There are many challenges in this field.
sentences.hindi: इस field में कई चुनौतियाँ हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE ar MAY-nee CHAL-en-jiz in this FEELD

sentences.english: project में देरी हुई है। → There has been a delay in the project.
sentences.hindi: project में देरी हुई है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE haz BIN uh duh-LAY in the PROJ-ekt

sentences.english: 1990 में कोई mobile phone नहीं था। → There were no mobile phones in 1990.
sentences.hindi: 1990 में कोई mobile phone नहीं था।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE wur NO MO-bile fonz in NINE-teen-NINE-tee

sentences.english: सुधार की हमेशा गुंजाइश होती है। → There is always room for improvement.
sentences.hindi: सुधार की हमेशा गुंजाइश होती है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE iz AWL-wayz ROOM for im-PROOV-ment

sentences.english: क्या यहाँ कोई ATM है? → Is there an ATM near here?
sentences.hindi: क्या यहाँ कोई ATM है?
sentences.pronunciation: IZ there an ay-tee-EM NEAR here?

sentences.english: कई बदलाव हुए हैं। → There have been many changes.
sentences.hindi: कई बदलाव हुए हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE hav BIN MAY-nee CHAYN-jiz

sentences.english: पर्याप्त समय नहीं है। → There isn't enough time.
sentences.hindi: पर्याप्त समय नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: THERE IZ-unt ih-NUF TIME

tips: यह drill आपकी Hindi-to-English translation speed बढ़ाएगी
रोज़ 5 Hindi sentences खुद बनाएँ और उन्हें English में translate करें
Fluency = thinking and speaking simultaneously — यही target है!
